old_value: {"id":"broadside-to5p.11","title":"Delivery worker creates fresh HTTP client per cycle","description":"delivery::run_worker creates a reqwest::Client at startup which is fine, but the inbox handler in server.rs creates a new reqwest::Client::new() for every Follow request to send the Accept. reqwest::Client is designed to be reused (connection pooling, cookie jar). Store one in AppState and share it.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@reviewcommit.com","created_at":"2026-07-17T23:08:39.506612691Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T23:08:39.506612691Z","labels":["hardening"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"broadside-to5p.11","depends_on_id":"broadside-to5p","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T23:08:39.518818131Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: All quick fixes applied: markdown rendering, feed dedup, rate limiter wired in, error logging, shared HTTP client, clippy+rustfmt clean
